name: Solana Developers
fullText:
Are you using Kit plugins?

If not, you really should be. Plugins (and plugin clients) enable interoperability among JS clients, allowing them to seamlessly work with different Solana programs and tools. 

Just load a program and send a transaction in two lines — auto PDA https://t.co/PpESlDTp1e

Polymarket condemns the harassment & threats directed at Emanuel Fabian — or anyone else for that matter.

This behavior violates our Terms of Service & has no place on our platform. We've banned the accounts for all involved & will pass their info to the relevant authorities.
